description: Object storage service contract v1 — 15 operations for S3-compatible blob storage. Targets AWS S3, Cloudflare R2, Backblaze B2, MinIO, DigitalOcean Spaces. Buckets contain immutable objects keyed by string; supports multipart upload, presigned URLs, and metadata.

operations.description: List buckets accessible to the credentials
operations.name: bucket_list

operations.description: List objects in a bucket with optional prefix and delimiter
operations.name: object_list

operations.description: Get a bucket's configuration (region, lifecycle, CORS, encryption)
operations.name: bucket_get

operations.description: Retrieve object metadata without downloading the body
operations.name: object_head

operations.description: Copy an object within or across buckets
operations.name: object_copy

operations.description: Generate a time-limited presigned URL for object_get
operations.name: presign_get

operations.description: Generate a time-limited presigned URL for object_put
operations.name: presign_put

operations.description: Update an object's user-defined metadata or content-type
operations.name: object_set_metadata

operations.description: Delete multiple objects in a single operation (destructive, requires confirmation)
operations.name: object_bulk_delete

operations.description: Delete an empty bucket (destructive, requires confirmation)
operations.name: bucket_delete

operations.description: Upload many objects in a single batch operation
operations.name: object_bulk_put

title: object-storage-v1
